metadata.title: Partner URL Registry (US Healthcare)
metadata.description: Flat {normalized_url: partner_metadata} registry. Normalization strips protocol, 'www.', trailing slash, '(verify)' suffix, and lowercases. Designed for O(1) lookups: registry.get('nurse.com') -> full metadata. Merges entries across all 3 source xlsx files, preferring 'In Repo' status and highest priority when duplicates collide.

schema.value_per_key: {name, url, url_verify_needed, status, priority, categories[], specialties, type, notes, sources[]}
